name: python3-pyqt5.qtopengl
title: python3-pyqt5.qtopengl
summary: Python 3 bindings for Qt5's OpenGL module
description:
Python 3 bindings for Qt5's OpenGL module
The OpenGL module of PyQt5 provides widgets and utility classes
for OpenGL rendering in a PyQt5 application.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of this module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyqt5.qtopengl because Python 3 bindings for Qt5's OpenGL module.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyqt5.qtopengl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyqt5.qtopengl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyqt5.qtopengl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
